flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Hawaii at Hilo fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6k → 2.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Hawaii at Hilo fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Hawaii at Hilo rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (42.7% → 48.4%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Hawaii at Hilo rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (27.3% → 30.1%).
